steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The word 'However' signals a limitation: the 2012 study used only about 14 fish, which could undermine its conclusion. The question asks what claim the student wants to make about this limitation.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — a scientific debate: The passage does not present two competing sides arguing against each other. ✗
  • Choice B — an overlooked aspect: The passage does not suggest researchers missed something; it questions reliability due to sample size. ✗
  • Choice C — the findings may be unreliable: The small sample of ~14 fish is cited as a reason the study's conclusion could be exaggerated or skewed. ✓
  • Choice D — a change in behavior over time: No time-based behavioral shift is mentioned. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
